address: 56 Philadelphia House, 6 Cross Bedford Street, Sheffield, S6 3BS
lead_profile_text: Property is already operating as STL via a rent-to-rent agency at a fixed £900/month. Furnished and at spec. Victor (taoyuanqing@gmail.com) and a second participant (lichunxiaouk@gmail.com) — likely joint owners or couple. Seeking professional direct management to own the listing, reviews, and income visibility themselves.
emotional_profile: Familiar with STL concept but zero direct ownership of listing, reviews, or income visibility. Detail-oriented — wants full cost transparency and to be kept informed. The financial case for switching is marginal; primary levers are control, AirCover protection, and flexibility.
delay_trigger_phrases: Negotiate with the existing rent-to-rent operator to leave furnishings in place
Reviews: can reviews survive the R2R-to-owner transition?
delay_timeline: Pending: sharing Airbnb listing link; negotiating exit from R2R operator; assessing listing transfer feasibility

top_objections.text: Understanding all the costs involved (management fees, platform fees, cleaning, software)
top_objections.zac_response: Costs walked through in detail during the meeting

top_objections.text: Not being kept informed — wants full visibility on what's happening with the property
top_objections.zac_response: Slack channel, live calendar, monthly income statements offered

top_objections.text: Review building for a new or transferred listing — can reviews survive the R2R-to-owner transition?
top_objections.zac_response: Assessed on case-by-case basis; listing transfer possible if existing photos and reviews are strong

top_objections.text: Photography uncertainty — will existing listing photos work or is a new shoot needed?
top_objections.zac_response: Assess existing listing first; if reviews flag photo mismatch, arrange new shoot; if reviews strong, try listing transfer

top_questions.text: Can Stayful transfer the existing Airbnb listing and reviews rather than starting a new one?
top_questions.answer: Assessed on a case-by-case basis — need to review existing listing. If photos and reviews are strong, listing transfer is the preferred route. If reviews are weak or photo mismatch exists, fresh listing with new shoot.

top_questions.text: How does Stayful handle bad reviews?
top_questions.answer: Snagging process: property inspection triggered, then contractors if needed. ~1 in 4 bookings converts to a review; majority are 5-star.

what_moved_them: AirCover protection — £2.5M damage cover vs zero under current R2R arrangement
Full visibility and control — Slack channel, live calendar, monthly statements
Practical negotiation strategy: ask existing R2R operator to leave furnishings in place
Honest framing of the ramp-up phase — no oversell
what_fell_flat: Financial uplift case is marginal: STL Y2 net ~£10,066 vs current R2R fixed £10,800 — switching is not obviously financially superior

conversion_gaps.gap: Financial case for switching is marginal (STL Y2 net ~£10,066 vs R2R fixed ~£10,800)
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Frame the conversion on control, AirCover, listing ownership, personal use flexibility, and upside potential — not pure income lift

conversion_gaps.gap: Listing transfer feasibility unknown until Airbnb link reviewed
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Victor to share existing Airbnb listing link; assess photos and reviews; confirm transfer or fresh listing route before moving forward

zac_income_intro: Gross ~£18,251/year; net ~£10,066/year (~£839/month average). Peak month July ~£1,077 net. Top-performing comparable listings hitting ~£40,000 gross. Comparables all within 1km.
zac_reassurance_phrases: If we can do a listing transfer — keep the existing photos and reviews — go-live is rapid and you could capture July peak
AirCover is £2.5M damage cover — that's protection you currently have zero of under the R2R arrangement
